## 📋 1 display Commands Found

### **1. DISplay**

**📋 Description:** This query-only command returns the current Display settings.



**⚙️ Syntax:** `DISplay?`

**🔧 Type:** query

**🏭 Supported Families:** MSO2, MSO4, MSO5, MSO6, MSO7
